focus_guidance: Functioning F1=0.198 triggers bootstrap mode. Symptom regressed -38.4%, Relationship -29.3%. Must not regress Events or People.

details: gemini-3-flash systematically over-codes symptom/anxiety/functioning and under-codes relationship. On matched events where GT has R=distance/projection/overfunctioning/inside, AI instead codes S=up A=up F=down with no R value. Model is treating SARF as general emotional assessment rather than specific clinical coding. Root fix: clarify that interpersonal dynamics should be coded as relationship, not inferred as anxiety/symptom/functioning.

change_description: Restructured SARF coding section: moved Relationship first with CODING PRIORITY guidance, added anti-inference rules for S/A/F, added common confusion examples
rationale: Aggregate and Events improved. SARF within stochastic range. Keep structural changes and add examples next.

reason: Events F1 dropped 0.379->0.315. Model became too conservative. Reverted ALL changes.
reverted_change: SARF restructure + WRONG/RIGHT examples + schema descriptions

change_description: Added SARF DECISION GUIDE (additive, prioritized checklist for choosing which variable to code). No restrictions on S/A/F.
rationale: R and F improved slightly while S/A stayed flat. Additive approach works better than restrictive.

description: Expanded Functioning definition with Bowen solid-self/pseudo-self language
notes: Functioning REGRESSED -0.036 vs baseline. Bowen-specific language didn't help model distinguish functioning. Reverted to original terse definition.

description: Added positive examples 5 (overfunctioning) and 6 (distance) to show correct R coding
notes: S regressed -0.208, A regressed -0.076, R unchanged. Examples actively hurt S/A without improving R. Reverted. Examples approach (both positive and negative) doesn't work for SARF.

description: Additive schema description for Event.relationship listing all values
notes: Schema description changes consistently cause under-extraction. Events F1 dropped -0.054. All SARF metrics worse. Confirmed: schema descriptions are NOT a viable lever for SARF improvement with this model. Reverted.

description: Final confirmation run with Decision Guide only (iter 3b)
notes: Marginal improvement vs baseline. No regressions. Convergence reached after 6 iterations.
